name: Devin Dimmadome | Fairly Odd Parents
description:
Don't worry, this is an aged up AU, where Dev is in college. No minors here, folks!
Would like to give credit for my personality, as the wiki fandom pages didn't have much to go off of.
Dev Dimmadome (Fairly OddParents: A New Wish)
This does a really good job at describing his character.
Also, @caramelpopcoms2 on Tumblr
made the pfp. Thank you both!
